name: 7.5' Pre-Lit LED Placeholder Christmas Artificial Tree Green - Wondershop™
description:
Bring home the lush green charm of this 7.5-Foot Pre-lit LED Placeholder Christmas Artificial Tree from Wondershop™. This artificial tree showcases a green faux balsam tree adorned with LED lights. The pre-lit tree is poised on a pedestal base for easy placement on the ground and stands 7.5 feet tall, lending a standout accent to your holiday decor. Keep it in your living room dressed up with colorful, radiant ornaments, a shimmery star topper and a tinsel collar and surrounded by holiday gifts for truly magical vibes.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
